items.title: Gemini & Assistant Integration
items.description: NoteNext is now a first-class citizen! Use voice commands with Gemini or Google Assistant to create notes, add to lists, or find specific notes natively.

items.title: Material 3 Expressive & Predictive Back
items.description: Implemented the latest M3 Expressive motion engine and Predictive Back gestures for a more fluid, responsive, and modern user experience.

items.title: AI Analyzer UI Fixes
items.description: Restored the AI Analyzer functionality in both the Add/Edit and Project screens with new summary sheets.

items.title: Navigation & Backstack Cleanup
items.description: Refactored the navigation drawer to ensure a clean backstack, fixing issues with unexpected screen jumping and double-clicks.

items.title: Startup & Splash Optimization
items.description: Optimized app startup time by removing redundant delays and refining the system splash screen transition.

items.title: M3 Expressive Redesign
items.description: Redesigned the entire app with Material 3 Expressive components, smooth spring animations, and a modern SplashScreen.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Optimized note list scrolling with efficient item reuse and removed layout jumping.

items.title: Decorative Top Bar
items.description: Enhanced the Add/Edit screen with decorative M3E buttons and centered alignment.

items.title: Project View AI & Sync
items.description: Brought AI summarization, grammar fixes, and live sync indicators to the Project view.

items.title: Critical Bug Fixes
items.description: Fixed app crashes when opening locked notes and during AI summarization in projects.

items.title: Update & Share
items.description: Redesigned the update dialog with wavy indicators and added the Play Store link to share options.
